$comment: ENG-2377 T1 — normative fail-consistent entitlements-client conformance corpus (gates/entitlements/**). Lists the 5 fixture cases both the Go orvex-studio-lib/entitlements client and the TS engine EntitlementService trio conform to, driven via a fake billing HTTP server (httptest.NewServer / an in-process TS equivalent) — never against either client's own cache/resolve internals. Maps 1:1 to AC1-AC5 (CS ×#6 — no speculative case beyond the five ACs). Vendored here as JSON (source-of-truth in orvex-studio-contracts is YAML; this repo has no direct js-yaml/yaml dependency and this Issue introduces none — same case IDs, same content, JSON-converted losslessly, see gates/PIN).

ac_map.AC4: all cases (both Go + TS clients driven against the same file set)

$notes: Response bodies in every case use ONLY the ratified entitlements.schema.json shape (plan/plan_version/features/caps/trial/throttle/version/evaluatedAt). No case encodes the superseded draft skeleton (tenantId/quotas{}) or a numeric Free AI budget/lifetime counter shape — that draft was retired at contracts commit 8aed191 and never implemented by any producer or consumer.
